name: French Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 pounds fresh tomatoes, skinned, seeded, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepot, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the bacon and cook until it is slightly crispy.
2. Add the carrots and onions to the pot. Cover and slowly cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Sprinkle the flour evenly over the vegetables and stir gently until they are coated.
4. Cook the mixture for a few more minutes until the flour turns golden brown.
5. Add the diced tomatoes, garlic, and stock to the pot. Stir well.
6. Bring the sauce to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2 hours. Stir occasionally.
7. Add the sugar and season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Using a hand mixer or an immersion blender, carefully puree the sauce until smooth.
9. Strain the sauce through a fine sieve to remove any lumps.
Yield: 1 1/2 to 2 quarts
Recipe By: ESSENCE OF EMERIL SHOW
Date: September 26, 1996
